title: EvaluationLabel
description: What the sealed scorer sees. Carries all expected_* fields; never passed to the blind runner.

case_id.description: Unique identifier matching the corresponding EvaluationQuery.case_id.

expected_sources.description: Citation/retrieval targets expected for this case.

expected_numbers.description: Numeric values that must appear in the answer.

expected_calculations.description: Deterministic financial calculations expected for this case.

expected_answerability.description: Expected answerability status (answerable, partially_answerable, not_answerable, calculation_blocked).

expected_validation_status.description: Expected validation status (e.g. passed, blocked, failed).

expected_no_answer.description: True when the case expects a refusal / no-answer response.

required_answer_terms.description: Terms that must appear in the answer.

forbidden_answer_terms.description: Terms that must NOT appear in the answer.

slice_tags.description: Slice tags mirroring the question tags for per-slice scoring.
